zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton於1548年11月10日出生時，她的父親Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden23歲，母親Julyan Strache16歲。她於1567年9月13日與Robert Wilkinson在英國英格蘭貝德福爾諾迪爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年7月13日享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton于1548年11月10日出生时，她的父亲Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden23岁，母亲Julyan Strache16岁。她于1567年9月13日与Robert Wilkinson在英国英格兰貝德福爾諾迪爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年7月13日享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Wheaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Robert Wheaton came from England to Rehoboth, MA, c. 1636.

variants.name: Whiddon
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of numerous minor places in Devon named Whiddon. Some are named with Old English hwīt ‘white’ + dūn ‘hill’ or tūn ‘farmstead, estate’; others with Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + dūn or denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnetae
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Agnetis, genitive form of Agnes .

variants.name: Agnete
meanings: From Latin Agnetis, genitive form of Agnes .

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton was born on 10 November 1548, her father, Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden, was 23 and her mother, Julyan Strache, was 16. She married Robert Wilkinson on 13 September 1567, in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 13 July 1597, at the age of 48, and was buried in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton est née le 10 novembre 1548, son père, Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Julyan Strache, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Wilkinson le 13 septembre 1567, à Northill, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juillet 1597, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton am 10. November 1548 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden 23 und ihre Mutter Julyan Strache 16. Sie hat am 13. September 1567 in Northill, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Wilkinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juli 1597 im Alter von 48 Jahren und wurde in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton è nata il il 10 novembre 1548, sua padre, Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Julyan Strache, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Robert Wilkinson il 13 settembre 1567, nel Northill, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 luglio 1597, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Agnetae Wheatonが1548年11月10日に生まれた時，父Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weedenは23歳，母Julyan Stracheは16歳であった。1567年9月13日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアノースイルでRobert Wilkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年7月13日に48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Botolph Aldgate, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton(이)가 1548년 11월 10일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julyan Strache(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1567년 9월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 노르스이에서 Robert Wilkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 7월 13일 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton nasceu em 10 de novembro de 1548, seu pai, Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Julyan Strache, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Wilkinson em 13 de setembro de 1567, em Northill, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de julho de 1597, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Petrock, Exeter, Devon, England: эксетир ст петрокк, эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Agnetae Wheaton родилась 10 ноября 1548 г., её отцу по имени Sir Knight John Wheaton Or Weeden было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Julyan Strache, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wilkinson 13 сентября 1567 г. в местности нортилл, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 13 июля 1597 г. в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
